job_description:
# Healthcare Data Analyst III (Remote Capable)
Company: Geisinger
Source: Official company careers
Employment type: Full-time
Checked: April 30, 2026
Posted: April 2, 2026
URL: https://jobs.geisinger.org/job/danville/healthcare-data-analyst-iii-remote-capable/12064/93499785760
Apply: https://geisinger.wd5.myworkdayjobs.com/en-US/GeisingerExternal/job/Healthcare-Data-Analyst-III--Remote-Capable-_R-94243

## Highlights
- Remote-capable healthcare data analyst role supporting research analytics.
- Requires SQL and/or SAS programming with large relational database models.
- Uses EHR or healthcare claims data, preferably Epic Clarity, for research and healthcare analytics.
- Focuses on complex data extraction, manipulation, summarization, validation, data integrity, and stakeholder communication.
strengths: Very strong match for healthcare data, SQL, claims/EHR analytics, data validation, and reporting reliability.
Remote-capable official posting with visible apply link and requisition ID.
Data integrity, validation, and complex dataset work align closely with ETL/data quality background.
gaps: SAS and Epic Clarity should be treated as adjacent or preferred unless directly supported in the base resume.
Research analytics framing may need a resume emphasis on analytical datasets and stakeholder-ready findings.
notes: Apply first. Tailor toward healthcare claims/EHR data, SQL, data extraction, validation, reporting accuracy, and complex source-system reconciliation. Do not claim SAS or Epic Clarity unless already in the base resume.

replacements.replace: Healthcare Data Analyst | SQL Data Quality | Clinical & Claims Analytics
